home.aboutPoint2: Interactive tools and modern learning technologies
home.aboutPoint3: Educational experts specializing in Arabic language
home.noProducts: No products found in this category.
home.partnersSubtitle: We are proud to partner with leading educational institutions around the globe
home.publicationsSubtitle: We offer distinguished educational collections carefully designed to meet the needs of learners at various stages.
home.videoSubtitle: A quick look at our mission, programs, and our impact on Arabic language education.

legal.privacyContent: At CASP Education, we prioritize your privacy. We collect only the data necessary to provide our educational services at the best possible quality.

store.title: Educational Store
store.description: Your premier destination for reliable educational resources. Books, software, and tools for an enjoyable learning journey.
store.bundleDesc: Get 20% off when buying the full series + school bag.

alMufid.title: Al-Mufid Series
alMufid.description: Your practical companion for mastering Arabic. A series focusing on the functional use of language in daily life and study.

alShamil.title: Al-Shamil Series
alShamil.description: A robust academic curriculum for teaching Arabic to non-native speakers, designed for universities and specialized centers.

alWafi.title: Al-Wafi Series
alWafi.description: The comprehensive reference for the Arabic student. Full coverage of grammar, morphology, and rhetoric in a modern style.
alWafi.exercisesDesc: Thousands of questions and exercises to consolidate information.

gardenOfArabic.title: Garden of Arabic
gardenOfArabic.description: A comprehensive educational series that takes the student on an enjoyable growth journey, from planting the seeds of letters to harvesting the fruits of eloquence and expression.
gardenOfArabic.exercisesDesc: A group of exercises and activities to enhance learning.

qawaedMobasta.title: Simplified Grammar
qawaedMobasta.description: Goodbye to grammar complexities. We present Arabic grammar in a smart visual style and mind maps that make understanding intuitive.

tareeqAlMuneerAr.title: Tareeq Al-Muneer
tareeqAlMuneerAr.description: A specialized methodology for teaching Arabic reading and writing, leading the student from illiteracy to fluency.

tareeqAlMuneerFr.title: Tareeq Al-Muneer (French Version)
tareeqAlMuneerFr.description: A curriculum designed specifically for French-speaking students, combining Arabic grammar precision with French style explanation.

tareeqAlMuneerEn.title: Tareeq Al Muneer (English)
tareeqAlMuneerEn.description: The comprehensive guide to learning Arabic for English speakers.

hidayah.title: Hidayah Curriculum
hidayah.description: An integrated Islamic educational series aiming to build balanced character and plant noble values in youth.

hidayahFr.title: Hidayah Curriculum (French)
hidayahFr.description: An integrated Islamic curriculum for French speakers, linking authentic Islamic values to the child's European reality.

hidayahEn.title: Hidayah Curriculum (English)
hidayahEn.description: An integrated Islamic curriculum for English speakers. Connecting authentic values with daily life in the West.

theHappyMuslim.title: The Happy Muslim
theHappyMuslim.description: A fun educational series aiming to build the Muslim child's character by planting values of happiness, optimism, and love of good.
